description: This source file provides utility functions and handlers for standardized error handling in a FastAPI application, including functions to extract request IDs and to install global exception handlers for different error types.

methods.name: Optional[str] _request_id_from_scope(request: Request)
methods.description: Extracts the request ID from the request scope or headers, used for correlating logs and responses.

methods.name: Dict[str,Any] _error_body(*, message: str, code: str, details: Any, request_id: Optional[str])
methods.description: Constructs the standardized JSON error response body with message, code, details, and request ID.

methods.name: None install_error_handlers(app: FastAPI)
methods.description: Main function to set up global exception handlers on the FastAPI app to provide consistent error responses.

ctags.name: _error_body
ctags.pattern: /^def _error_body(*, message: str, code: str, details: Any, request_id: Optional[str]) -> Dict[str/
ctags.signature: (*, message: str, code: str, details: Any, request_id: Optional[str])

ctags.name: http_exception_handler
ctags.pattern: /^    async def http_exception_handler(request: Request, exc: HTTPException):$/

ctags.name: unhandled_exception_handler
ctags.pattern: /^    async def unhandled_exception_handler(request: Request, exc: Exception):$/

ctags.name: validation_exception_handler
ctags.pattern: /^    async def validation_exception_handler(request: Request, exc: RequestValidationError):$/
